name: static ref: connected element at mount, nulled on unmount
src:
mkDoc = ->
    mk = (tag) ->
      n = { tag, childNodes: [], parentNode: null, nodeType: (if tag is '#comment' then 8 else 1), _connected: false }
      n.appendChild = (c) ->
        c.parentNode.removeChild(c) if c.parentNode
        c.parentNode = n
        n.childNodes.push c
        c
      n.insertBefore = (c, ref) ->
        c.parentNode.removeChild(c) if c.parentNode
        c.parentNode = n
        i = if ref? then n.childNodes.indexOf(ref) else -1
        if i >= 0 then n.childNodes.splice(i, 0, c) else n.childNodes.push c
        c
      n.removeChild = (c) ->
        i = n.childNodes.indexOf c
        n.childNodes.splice(i, 1) if i >= 0
        c.parentNode = null
        c
      n.remove = -> n.parentNode.removeChild(n) if n.parentNode
      n.setAttribute = (k, v) -> n.attrs = (n.attrs or {}); n.attrs[k] = v
      n.removeAttribute = (k) -> delete n.attrs[k] if n.attrs
      n.toggleAttribute = (k, on_) -> n.setAttribute(k, '')
      Object.defineProperty n, 'nextSibling',
        get: ->
          p = n.parentNode
          return null unless p
          i = p.childNodes.indexOf n
          if i >= 0 and i + 1 < p.childNodes.length then p.childNodes[i + 1] else null
      Object.defineProperty n, 'isConnected',
        get: ->
          x = n
          while x
            return true if x._connected
            x = x.parentNode
          false
      n
    { createElement: mk, createComment: (-> mk('#comment')), createTextNode: (-> mk('#text')) }
  globalThis.document = mkDoc()

  result = {}
  C = component
    el := null
    mounted: ->
      result.set = @el?
      result.connected = @el?.isConnected
    render
      input ref: el
  root = document.createElement('root')
  root._connected = true
  inst = C.new()
  inst.mount(root)
  atMount = "#{result.set}/#{result.connected}"
  inst.unmount()
  "#{atMount}/#{inst.el.value == null}"

name: dynamic ref (if): cell filled when shown, nulled when hidden
src:
mkDoc = ->
    mk = (tag) ->

      n.appendChild = (c) ->

        c
      n.removeChild = (c) ->
        i = n.childNodes.indexOf c
        n.childNodes.splice(i, 1) if i >= 0
        c.parentNode = null
        c
      n.remove = -> n.parentNode.removeChild(n) if n.parentNode
      n.setAttribute = (k, v) -> n.attrs = (n.attrs or {}); n.attrs[k] = v
      n.removeAttribute = (k) -> delete n.attrs[k] if n.attrs
      n.toggleAttribute = (k, on_) -> n.setAttribute(k, '')
      Object.defineProperty n, 'nextSibling',
        get: ->
          p = n.parentNode
          return null unless p
          i = p.childNodes.indexOf n
          if i >= 0 and i + 1 < p.childNodes.length then p.childNodes[i + 1] else null
      Object.defineProperty n, 'isConnected',
        get: ->
          x = n
          while x
            return true if x._connected
            x = x.parentNode
          false
      n
    { createElement: mk, createComment: (-> mk('#comment')), createTextNode: (-> mk('#text')) }
  globalThis.document = mkDoc()

  C = component
    open := false
    panel := null
    render
      div
        if open
          section ref: panel
  root = document.createElement('root')
  root._connected = true
  inst = C.new()
  inst.mount(root)
  before = inst.panel.value == null
  inst.open.value = true
  shown = inst.panel.value?.isConnected
  inst.open.value = false
  after = inst.panel.value == null
  "#{before}/#{shown}/#{after}"

name: async effect: stale resolution does not overwrite current cleanup

A = component
  x := 0
  ~>
    v = x + 0
    -> cleanups.push("cleanup-#{v}")
a = A.new()
a.x.value = 1
a.x.value = 2
# Each run should install its cleanup, prior run's cleanup runs on
# supersession. Order: setup-0; x=1 fires cleanup-0 then setup-1;
# x=2 fires cleanup-1 then setup-2. Cleanups so far: ['cleanup-0',
# 'cleanup-1']. unmount fires cleanup-2.
a.unmount?(removeDOM: false)
cleanups

name: __pushComponent preserves _parent across re-pushes
src:
A = component
  val =! "outer"
B = component
  val =! "inner"
outer = A.new()
inner = B.new()
__pushComponent(outer)     # outer becomes current
__pushComponent(inner)     # inner._parent = outer
__popComponent(outer)
__popComponent(null)
__pushComponent(inner)     # re-push inner with no current — must NOT clobber to null
__popComponent(null)
inner._parent is outer

name: context propagates from outer to inner across re-push
src:
Outer = component
  init = -> setContext("greeting", "hi")
Inner = component
  val = null
  _init = -> @val = getContext("greeting")
outer = Outer.new()
__pushComponent(outer)
outer.init()
inner = Inner.new()        # constructor runs _init under outer scope
__popComponent(null)
__pushComponent(inner)     # later self-push must preserve _parent
again = getContext("greeting")
__popComponent(null)
inner.val is "hi" and again is "hi"

src:
adapter =
    calls: []
    canned: {}
    query: (sql, params) ->
      @calls.push {sql, params}
      if @canned[sql] then @canned[sql] else (@canned.__default ?? {columns: [], data: [], rows: 0})
  __schemaSetAdapter adapter
  __SchemaRegistry.reset()
  trace = []
  User = schema :model
    name! string
    email! email @unique
    beforeSave:   -> trace.push "beforeSave"
    beforeCreate: -> trace.push "beforeCreate"
    beforeUpdate: -> trace.push "beforeUpdate"
    afterSave:    -> trace.push "afterSave"
  adapter.canned.__default = {columns: [{name: "id"}, {name: "name"}, {name: "email"}], data: [[1, "Alice", "a@b.c"]], rows: 1}
  u = User.upsert! {email: "a@b.c", name: "Alice"}, on: :email
  sql = adapter.calls[0].sql
  [sql.includes('ON CONFLICT ("email") DO UPDATE SET'), sql.includes('"name" = EXCLUDED."name"'), trace, u.id, u._persisted]

name: transaction! on: pins one adapter; other-adapter calls run outside
src:
calls = {a: [], b: []}
  mk = (tag) ->
    adapter = {}
    adapter.query = (sql, params) ->
      calls[tag].push sql
      {columns: [{name: "id"}, {name: "name"}], data: [[1, "x"]], rows: 1}
    adapter.begin = ->
      calls[tag].push "BEGIN"
      handle = {}
      handle.query = (sql) ->
        calls[tag].push "tx:" + sql.split(" ")[0]
        {columns: [], data: [], rows: 0}
      handle.commit = -> calls[tag].push "COMMIT"
      handle.rollback = -> calls[tag].push "ROLLBACK"
      handle
    adapter
  __schemaSetAdapter mk("a")
  __SchemaRegistry.reset()
  analytics = mk("b")
  User = schema :model
    name! string
  Event = schema :model, on: analytics
    name! string
  schema.transaction! on: analytics, ->
    Event.create! name: "e"
    User.create! name: "u"
    null
  txB = calls.b.filter (s) -> s.startsWith("tx:")
  txA = calls.a.filter (s) -> s.startsWith("tx:")
  [txB.length, txA.length, calls.b.includes("COMMIT"), calls.a.includes("BEGIN")]

events = []
  txCalls = []
  mainCalls = []
  resState = {res: {columns: [{name: "id"}, {name: "name"}], data: [[1, "A"]], rows: 1}}
  adapter =
    query: (sql, params) ->
      mainCalls.push sql
      events.push "main"
      resState.res
    begin: (opts) ->
      events.push "BEGIN"
      handle = {}
      handle.query = (sql, params) ->

        events.push "stmt"

name: two parallel transactions use independent handles (no cross-talk)
src:
events = []
  txCalls = []
  mainCalls = []
  resState = {res: {columns: [{name: "id"}, {name: "name"}], data: [[1, "A"]], rows: 1}}
  adapter =
    query: (sql, params) ->
      mainCalls.push sql
      events.push "main"
      resState.res
    begin: (opts) ->
      events.push "BEGIN"
      handle = {}
      handle.query = (sql, params) ->
        txCalls.push sql
        events.push "stmt"
        resState.res
      handle.commit = -> events.push "COMMIT"
      handle.rollback = -> events.push "ROLLBACK"
      handle
    capabilities: {tx: true}
  __schemaSetAdapter adapter
  __SchemaRegistry.reset()
  User = schema :model
    name! string
  handles = []
  adapter.begin = ->
    box = {sqls: []}
    handles.push box
    handle = {}
    handle.query = (sql, params) ->
      box.sqls.push sql
      resState.res
    handle.commit = -> null
    handle.rollback = -> null
    handle
  run = (a, b) ->
    schema.transaction! ->
      User.create! {name: a}
      sleep! 5
      User.create! {name: b}
      null
  p1 = run "A", "B"
  p2 = run "C", "D"
  Promise.all! [p1, p2]
  [handles.length, handles[0].sqls.length, handles[1].sqls.length, mainCalls.length]
